result.summary: Found several visual issues, mostly related to overlapping elements, clipped content, and readability problems in the promotional page.

issues.description: The large BetRivers logo card at the top of the hero appears clipped by the sticky header. Its top edge is cut off/hidden, making the badge look broken.
issues.suggestion: Add top spacing below the header or adjust the hero/logo positioning so the full rounded logo card is visible.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' overlay sits on top of the fine-print legal text, making part of the disclaimer unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Move the scroll prompt higher, place it in its own dedicated area, or hide it once the user reaches this section.

issues.description: The legal disclaimer text is extremely small and low contrast against the yellow background, making it difficult to read on mobile.
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size, improve contrast, and provide more spacing so the legal copy remains legible.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation visually crowds the lower content area and may obscure content near the bottom of the page.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding to the page content equal to the height of the fixed nav, or ensure overlays and disclaimers are positioned above it.

issues.description: The top header is crowded with multiple logos, the hamburger icon, state label, and CTA button, which makes the area feel visually cramped on mobile.
issues.suggestion: Simplify the header layout for mobile, reduce logo count/size, or move secondary branding into the menu.
